Posted at 8:00 AM EST

I give you...worried so bad he's about to throw up Satoru 😍

Warning, he might start crying 😭

moving on,

Last time, I asked fellow creators what their weirdest or most annoying review was, now I'm wondering what are y'alls biggest pet peeves about being a creator 👀

Besides the AI being so annoying sometimes (and then certain users blaming you for it) one of my biggest pet peeves is people not reading my suggestion rules 😭

I have a document for my rules + it's on my google form and people STILL don't get it, like how??? I even have them linked in my bio and all my captions 😀

Another pet peeve is when people simply DON'T READ THE DAMN CAPTION and then ask questions that are already answered in the caption 🚶‍♀️

Omg, I just remembered another one and that's getting on trending 😭

(this sounds insanely spoiled I just wanna let y'all know that I do appreciate the love and attention I get on these bots 💖)

However, the trending page is usually where all the weird people are and I gotta watch the review section like a HAWK to delete people saying weird things cause holy FUCK why are some users so comfortable saying slurs/crude comments/dumbassery/etc 😭

moving on,

Possible little Z and Down collab coming out soon??? (Depends if our lazy asses actually get to it)

My ankle hurts wtf

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
